subject: Code freeze for v3.15 release
body:
Engineering team,

Code freeze for v3.15 starts Wednesday 3/12 at 5pm PT.

Please ensure all PRs are merged by then. Release is scheduled for Friday 3/14.

Key changes in v3.15:
- New analytics dashboard
- OAuth2 PKCE support
- Performance improvements (3x faster queries)
- DataPulse ML pipeline (beta)

Priya
